pi_items.source: Task description in task.json explicitly requires enabling the Login as Customer feature. In Magento 2, value '1' represents enabled state.
Task description in task.json explicitly states: 'Set the Page Header Title to 'Assisted Service Mode'.' This matches the metadata value exactly.

Task description in task.json explicitly states: 'Set 'Online Minutes Interval' to '5'.' Verified with Magento 2 documentation that customer/online/interval is the correct config path, and 5 minutes is a valid value (default is 15 minutes).

Task description in task.json explicitly states: 'Set the 'Send Emails To' address to 'support@luminarygadgets.com'.' Valid email format. Luminary Gadgets is the fictional company in the task scenario.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata values are verified against the explicit task requirements. The task requires configuring four Magento support features: enabling Login as Customer (value: 1), setting the UI title to 'Assisted Service Mode', reducing the online customer tracking interval to 5 minutes, and routing contact emails to support@luminarygadgets.com. All claimed values match the task description exactly and are valid Magento configuration values.
